title: SmartMobs
description: SmartMobs is a cool mod that makes Minecraft mobs a little bit smarter! Now, they can hop into minecarts, boats, and even ride horses all by themselves. Imagine seeing a zombie driving a minecart – how funny would that be?  It works in Minecraft Java Editi
body:
# SmartMobs

SmartMobs adds a hilarious twist to Minecraft by giving mobs the ability to control vehicles! Watch as zombies commandeer minecarts, skeletons take the reins of horses, and creepers navigate boats. Get ready for some unexpected and comical moments!

## Features

* **Intelligent Mobs:** Mobs can now autonomously enter and control minecarts, boats, and horses.
* **Varied Behavior:** Different mobs exhibit unique vehicle preferences, leading to entertaining scenarios.
* **Server-Side Compatibility:** Enjoy the mob mayhem with your friends on multiplayer servers.
* **Easy Installation:** Compatible with the Fabric mod loader for seamless integration.

## How It Works

SmartMobs introduces an AI system that enables mobs to detect and interact with nearby vehicles. They utilize basic movement commands to navigate, resulting in unpredictable and amusing behavior.

## Compatibility

* Minecraft Java Edition 1.21.5
* Fabric mod loader

## Additional Information

* Explore the mod's source code: [View source](https://github.com/unkn0wncvm1/smartmobs)
* Report bugs or suggest improvements: [Report issues](https://github.com/unkn0wncvm1/smartmobs/issues)

SmartMobs injects a dose of hilarity into your Minecraft experience. Prepare for some truly unforgettable mob moments!
